markdownRemark.excerpt: ʿĪd Al-Fiṭr has been announced for tomorrow in shā’ Allāh. Please join us for the ʿĪd prayer at Ruth Wildgens Park (or Boys & Girls Club in case of rain) at…
markdownRemark.html:
ʿĪd Al-Fiṭr has been announced for tomorrow in shā’ Allāh. Please join us for the ʿĪd prayer at Ruth Wildgens Park (or Boys & Girls Club in case of rain) at 9:00AM sharp.

Announcement

frontmatter.title: Who is Shaykh Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān ʿAjjāl
